turns.query: Help me evaluate the pollution footprint of Tianjin Iron Works Co., Ltd. (company_id: 2564) on 2025-06-10 at 19:00 under low wind speed conditions.
turns.actual_response:
2025年6月10日19:00，天津铁厂有限公司污染足迹评估如下：

- 企业当小时排放量：烟气量为 23,152,800 立方米，氮氧化物为 211.234 kg，二氧化硫为 96.251 kg，颗粒物为 46.822 kg。
- 企业周边10公里范围内共有 8 个空气质量监测站，其中 7 个在该时刻有有效监测数据。
- 周边10公里风场平均风速为 3.20 m/s，最小和最大风速均为 3.20 m/s，风向约为 138.9°，即污染物总体输送方向约为 318.9°，指向西北方向。
- 按输送方位看，该时刻10公里范围内没有有效的下风向监测站数据；6个侧风向站点平均 AQI 为 52.83，PM2.5 为 16.33，PM10 为 48.67，SO₂ 为 10.83，NO₂ 为 17.83，CO 为 0.90；1个上风向站点 AQI 为 46，PM2.5 为 11，PM10 为 46，SO₂ 为 5，NO₂ 为 11，CO 为 0.80。
- 按距离看，有效监测站全部位于5—10公里圈层，平均 AQI 为 51.86，PM2.5 为 15.57，PM10 为 48.29，SO₂ 为 10.00，NO₂ 为 16.86，CO 为 0.89；0—5公里范围缺少有效站点支撑，因此无法直接判定近场浓度梯度。

综合判断：该时刻企业排放强度较高，污染输送方向主要指向西北；但10公里内有效监测站主要分布在侧风向和上风向，缺少下风向及5公里内近场监测数据，因此现有监测证据不足以定量确认企业排放对下风向空气质量的直接增量影响。建议监管上重点补强西北向下风向、特别是0—5公里范围的监测布设，并结合连续时段排放、风场和站点浓度变化开展溯源核查。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

ts = "2025-06-10 19:00:00"
company_id = 2564

q = text("""
WITH company AS (
  SELECT id, coordinate
  FROM polluting_company
  WHERE id = :company_id
),
em AS (
  SELECT exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm
  FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
  WHERE company_id = :company_id AND timestamp = :ts
),
station_scope AS (
  SELECT a.id, ST_Distance(a.coordinate, c.coordinate) AS dist_m,
         degrees(ST_Azimuth(c.coordinate::geometry, a.coordinate::geometry)) AS bearing_deg
  FROM air_quality_station a CROSS JOIN company c
  WHERE ST_DWithin(a.coordinate, c.coordinate, 10000)
),
wind AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS n,
         AVG(wind_speed) AS avg_speed,
         MIN(wind_speed) AS min_speed,
         MAX(wind_speed) AS max_speed,
         degrees(atan2(AVG(sin(radians(wind_degree))), AVG(cos(radians(wind_degree))))) AS mean_from_raw
  FROM hourly_grid_wind w CROSS JOIN company c
  WHERE w.timestamp = :ts AND ST_DWithin(w.coordinate, c.coordinate, 10000)
),
wind_norm AS (
  SELECT n, avg_speed, min_speed, max_speed,
         CASE WHEN mean_from_raw < 0 THEN mean_from_raw + 360 ELSE mean_from_raw END AS wind_from_deg,
         CASE WHEN mean_from_raw < 0 THEN mean_from_raw + 180 ELSE mod((mean_from_raw + 180)::numeric, 360)::double precision END AS transport_to_deg
  FROM wind
),
station_at_hour AS (
  SELECT s.id, s.dist_m, s.bearing_deg, h.aqi, h.pm2_5, h.pm10, h.so2, h.no2, h.co,
         LEAST(ABS(s.bearing_deg - wn.transport_to_deg), 360 - ABS(s.bearing_deg - wn.transport_to_deg)) AS downwind_angle
  FROM station_scope s
  JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id = s.id AND h.timestamp = :ts
  CROSS JOIN wind_norm wn
),
sector_stats AS (
  SELECT CASE 
           WHEN downwind_angle <= 45 THEN 'downwind'
           WHEN downwind_angle >= 135 THEN 'upwind'
           ELSE 'crosswind'
         END AS sector,
         COUNT(*) AS stations_reporting,
         AVG(dist_m)/1000 AS avg_distance_km,
         AVG(aqi) AS avg_aqi,
         AVG(pm2_5) AS avg_pm25,
         AVG(pm10) AS avg_pm10,
         AVG(so2) AS avg_so2,
         AVG(no2) AS avg_no2,
         AVG(co) AS avg_co,
         MAX(aqi) AS max_aqi
  FROM station_at_hour
  GROUP BY 1
),
ring_stats AS (
  SELECT CASE 
           WHEN dist_m < 3000 THEN '0-3km'
           WHEN dist_m < 5000 THEN '3-5km'
           ELSE '5-10km'
         END AS ring,
         COUNT(*) AS stations_reporting,
         AVG(aqi) AS avg_aqi,
         AVG(pm2_5) AS avg_pm25,
         AVG(pm10) AS avg_pm10,
         AVG(so2) AS avg_so2,
         AVG(no2) AS avg_no2,
         AVG(co) AS avg_co
  FROM station_at_hour
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  (SELECT exhaust_gas FROM em) AS exhaust_gas,
  (SELECT nox FROM em) AS nox,
  (SELECT so2 FROM em) AS em_so2,
  (SELECT pm FROM em) AS em_pm,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM station_scope) AS stations_10km,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM station_at_hour) AS stations_reporting_10km,
  (SELECT n FROM wind_norm) AS wind_grid_count,
  (SELECT avg_speed FROM wind_norm) AS avg_wind_speed,
  (SELECT min_speed FROM wind_norm) AS min_wind_speed,
  (SELECT max_speed FROM wind_norm) AS max_wind_speed,
  (SELECT wind_from_deg FROM wind_norm) AS wind_from_deg,
  (SELECT transport_to_deg FROM wind_norm) AS transport_to_deg,
  (SELECT json_agg(sector_stats ORDER BY sector) FROM sector_stats) AS sector_stats,
  (SELECT json_agg(ring_stats ORDER BY ring) FROM ring_stats) AS ring_stats
""")

res = pd.read_sql(q, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "ts": ts}).iloc[0]

flue_gas_1900 = float(res["exhaust_gas"]) if pd.notna(res["exhaust_gas"]) else float("nan")
nox_1900 = float(res["nox"]) if pd.notna(res["nox"]) else float("nan")
so2_1900 = float(res["em_so2"]) if pd.notna(res["em_so2"]) else float("nan")
pm_1900 = float(res["em_pm"]) if pd.notna(res["em_pm"]) else float("nan")
stations_within_10km = int(res["stations_10km"]) if pd.notna(res["stations_10km"]) else 0

summary = {
    "flue_gas_1900": flue_gas_1900,
    "nox_1900": nox_1900,
    "so2_1900": so2_1900,
    "pm_1900": pm_1900,
    "stations_within_10km": stations_within_10km,
    "stations_reporting_10km": int(res["stations_reporting_10km"]) if pd.notna(res["stations_reporting_10km"]) else 0,
    "wind_grid_count": int(res["wind_grid_count"]) if pd.notna(res["wind_grid_count"]) else 0,
    "avg_wind_speed": None if pd.isna(res["avg_wind_speed"]) else float(res["avg_wind_speed"]),
    "min_wind_speed": None if pd.isna(res["min_wind_speed"]) else float(res["min_wind_speed"]),
    "max_wind_speed": None if pd.isna(res["max_wind_speed"]) else float(res["max_wind_speed"]),
    "wind_from_deg": None if pd.isna(res["wind_from_deg"]) else float(res["wind_from_deg"]),
    "transport_to_deg": None if pd.isna(res["transport_to_deg"]) else float(res["transport_to_deg"]),
}
sector_stats_1900 = res["sector_stats"] if res["sector_stats"] is not None else []
ring_stats_1900 = res["ring_stats"] if res["ring_stats"] is not None else []

print("关键排放、监测覆盖和风场汇总：")
print(summary)
print("按输送方位分组的站点空气质量均值：")
print(sector_stats_1900)
print("按距离圈层分组的站点空气质量均值：")
print(ring_stats_1900)
